findings.summary: Repeatedly hitting file size limits on large Exa JSON, tried incompatible GNU grep flags on macOS before writing Python parser
findings.evidence: Session 0bf6a590: after mcp__exa returned 143k char JSON, agent tried Read twice (10k limit), tried GNU grep -oP (macOS incompatible), before writing a working Python script
findings.proposed_fix: skill — add jq or Python JSON processing guidance for large Exa payloads

note: Genomics CC sessions already analyzed 12+ times today (observe loop saturation). Codex subagent threads all clean. Selve sessions high quality.
